title: premna oblongifolia var. major
intro: Premna oblongifolia var. major, also known as the Tall Premna or Indian bryony, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Premna oblongifolia var. major include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and act as an antidote for various poisonings. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
